hero.title: We build AI systems for business,
hero.text: We automate the routine of sales, procurement, and support for small and mid-sized businesses — so your team focuses on growth, not manual work.

items.title: Process audit
items.text: We find where you lose time and money on routine work.

items.title: Prototype
items.text: In 1–2 weeks we show a working scenario on your own data.

items.title: Deployment
items.text: We integrate into CRM, messengers, and spreadsheets without downtime.

items.title: Support
items.text: We track metrics and keep evolving the system.

items.title: AI assistants
items.text: Chatbots for websites, Telegram, CRM, and internal teams.

items.title: Business automation
items.text: We connect forms, CRM, spreadsheets, email, and messengers into one flow.

items.title: AI integrations
items.text: Models, classification, response generation, and document processing.

items.title: Reliable architecture
items.text: Access control, logging, scenario governance, and support for growth.

analytics.heading: Sales & procurement analytics
analytics.text: AI collects sales and procurement data, builds dashboards, detects anomalies, and forecasts demand and purchasing needs.

items.title: Automated lead handling
items.text: Leads land in CRM, get sorted by AI, and are assigned to a manager.
items.detail: 200 leads/day by hand → auto-routed in seconds

items.title: AI customer support
items.text: The bot answers FAQs, collects data, and escalates the complex to a human.
items.detail: 60% of requests are routine → the bot closes them itself

items.title: Documents & reports
items.text: Generate templates, summaries, and reports without manual copy-pasting.

contact.heading: Let's discuss your project
contact.text: Tell us your challenge — we'll figure out what to automate first and how quickly it delivers results.
contact.note: We reply within 2 hours · free process review · no commitment
contact.successText: I'll get back to you within the day.

cookie.text: We use analytics to improve the site.
